commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Human maintainer handling remains because the PR has a protected maintainer label and intentionally changes compatibility/security-boundary strictness; no narrow automation repair remains.; Cleared: The diff is security-sensitive but fail-closes unsupported policy claims and does not change dependencies, scripts, secrets, permissions, or package resolution. (sha=3ab4ff1d8f770a75da665b9502a4ff9d3b8d9519)
commands.review_summary:
The PR tightens the Policy plugin doctor/check and compare validation so unsupported `policy.jsonc` sections and rule keys fail, adds focused tests, and documents strict policy files.

PR surface: Source +359, Tests +175, Docs +2. Total +536 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main lacks the unsupported-key allowlists while the PR adds them and tests concrete rejected policy shapes. I did not run tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human maintainer handling remains because the PR has a protected maintainer label and intentionally changes compatibility/security-boundary strictness; no narrow automation repair remains.
